title: calophyllum rufigemmatum
intro: Calophyllum rufigemmatum, also known as the Borneo canarium, is a species of evergreen tree native to Borneo and other parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its oil, which has been found to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Calophyllum rufigemmatum include its potential to reduce pain, improve skin conditions, and support wound healing. The oil is often extracted through cold pressing and used in herbal preparations such as creams, ointments, and essential oils.
